personal.preferred_title: Senior Monitoring / Observability Engineer | Financial Services Reliability

summary: Senior Monitoring, Observability, and Telemetry Analytics Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience across financial-services production systems, log/telemetry analysis, APM platforms, SQL/Oracle, dashboards, alerting, incident support, root-cause analysis, and operational reporting. Deep hands-on background with Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics, CA APM/Introscope, BMC TrueSight/TSCO, AppDynamics, transaction tracing, performance analytics, Python/SQL automation, and regulated production support. Strong fit for monitoring roles that need reliability engineering, operational metrics, incident triage, and clear communication with technical and business stakeholders.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and supported telemetry analytics pipelines that ingested operational data from 6,000+ infrastructure endpoints into curated datasets for monitoring, capacity planning, forecasting, and executive reporting.
Integrated BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM/Wily, AppDynamics, and infrastructure telemetry into unified reporting layers used by engineering, operations, and leadership teams.
Analyzed performance and capacity data to identify infrastructure hotspots, anomalies, underutilized systems, and operational risks across regulated banking technology environments.
Developed Python, SQL, Pandas, and PySpark-oriented automation for telemetry extraction, validation, reconciliation, exception handling, recurring reporting, and production support workflows.
Created dashboards, operational reports, alerting inputs, runbooks, data dictionaries, and stakeholder narratives to support incident review, troubleshooting, and operational decision-making.
Troubleshot missing, inconsistent, or delayed telemetry by tracing source feeds, transformation logic, database behavior, reporting defects, and downstream consumer expectations.
Designed Oracle-backed historical retention structures and reporting tables to support large-scale time-series analysis, operational metrics, and capacity trend reviews.
Partnered with infrastructure, application, operations, and management teams to explain risks, recommend corrective actions, and improve monitoring and support processes.
Applied regulated-enterprise practices around access controls, auditability, documentation, secure data handling, incident support, and production reliability.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and other critical hospitality systems, improving visibility into web and mobile performance.
Implemented End User Monitoring and end-to-end transaction tracing to expose user-experience issues, dependency behavior, and production bottlenecks.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance telemetry to identify trends, anomalies, and optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security while maintaining production monitoring continuity.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load-test behavior with APM telemetry and support performance engineering decisions.
Maintained monitoring documentation and supported troubleshooting across application and infrastructure teams.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / CA APM SME
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a regulated financial-services environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, management modules, and reporting standards adopted across enterprise monitoring environments.
Built Perl/Korn Shell and SQL-driven extraction scripts that automated recurring telemetry reporting and replaced manual weekly exports.
Partnered with J2EE/WebLogic, middleware, database, and operations teams to diagnose bottlenecks using APM telemetry, transaction traces, and production evidence.
Delivered monitoring onboarding guidance, operational documentation, technical training, and knowledge-sharing materials for application and support teams.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom web applications under load to identify throughput limits, thread contention, JDBC constraints, heap pressure, CPU usage, and garbage-collection risks.
Installed and configured JMX monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation scripts for real-time visibility during performance tests.
Documented performance baselines, regression thresholds, and release-readiness evidence used by engineering teams.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Monitoring / Observability: Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, CA APM / Introscope, CA CEM, CA ADA, BMC TrueSight / TSCO, AppDynamics, JMX Monitoring, EUM/RUM, transaction tracing, synthetic monitoring
skills.Log & Telemetry Analysis: Telemetry analysis, log analysis concepts, distributed-system diagnostics, source-feed tracing, data quality validation, anomaly detection concepts, latency/error/availability metrics, operational trend analysis
skills.Dashboards / Alerts / Reporting: Dashboards, alert thresholds, SLA thresholds, operational reports, executive reporting, real-time and historical visibility, capacity reports, incident review reporting
skills.Incident Response / RCA: Incident triage, root-cause analysis, post-incident review support, corrective/preventive action tracking, escalation support, operational readiness, production support
skills.SQL & Databases: SQL, Oracle, PL/SQL, Oracle RAC, relational data analysis, query tuning, reporting tables, time-series retention structures, database-adjacent performance analysis
skills.Automation & Scripting: Python, Pandas, PySpark, Perl, Korn Shell, Bash concepts, SQL automation, data extraction, validation, reconciliation, report automation
skills.Financial Services / Regulated Ops: Regulated banking environments, audit-driven operations, access-control awareness, secure data handling, production reliability, compliance-minded documentation
skills.Applied Analytics: Capacity forecasting, Prophet, scikit-learn, trend analysis, anomaly detection concepts, predictive analytics for incident prevention, infrastructure risk analysis
skills.Tools Adjacent: Splunk search/dashboard/alert concepts, Elastic/OpenSearch concepts, Grafana/Tableau transferable concepts, ATM platform awareness, CEN/XFS awareness
skills.Delivery: Technical documentation, runbooks, knowledge sharing, mentoring, Agile/Scrum/Kanban, Git/GitHub workflows, stakeholder communication

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a capacity forecasting platform that transformed infrastructure telemetry into curated datasets, Prophet/scikit-learn forecasts, capacity-risk indicators, dashboards, and stakeholder reports for proactive resource planning.

projects.name: Observability and APM Telemetry Analytics
projects.description: Built and supported monitoring dashboards, telemetry extraction scripts, transaction tracing workflows, alert thresholds, and operational reports across Dynatrace, CA APM, BMC TrueSight, and AppDynamics environments.

projects.name: AI-Assisted Data Automation Workflow
projects.description: Built Python automation with structured JSON artifacts, LLM assistance, validation gates, and repeatable workflows, reinforcing disciplined automation and quality-control patterns useful for operational engineering.
